name: The New World
description:
A fictional scenario that is deemed questionable and taboo in most remarks that wearing and using diapers is normal to every being. 

Is it questionable? Yes.

Should it exist? No.

Why did I make this? No idea.

Will I be hated and despised by everyone for doing this? Absolutely.

Do I care? Probably not, because if someone thought of it, someone will bring it into being. Best to get it over with and let the misery soak in.

Oh yeah, if you have any suggestions or anything interesting pop up from your chats, go ahead share it with me or post your chats publicly. 

Side Note: In case of you are one of those “enthusiasts” like I am about these kinds of weird things, or generally want someone to talk to, or share some in depth feedback, here is my Discord. dr.chaosblackvoid (If you choose to send hate or harass me, I will block you. I am a person too like anyone else with feelings.)
creator: DuhMapBot
